Package com.sun.identity.console.service.model

Class DiscoveryDataCache

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.sun.identity.console.service.model.DiscoveryDataCache
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SSOTokenListener
    public class DiscoveryDataCache
extends Object
implements SSOTokenListener
    This class caches discover data object for Console. Token ID and a randomly generated string are used as key to cache and retrieve a discovery data.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      String cacheData​(SSOToken token, SMDiscoveryServiceData data)
      Caches a discovery data object
      protected void clearAllData​(SSOTokenID tokenID)
      Clears all cached discovery data of a given single sign on token ID
      SMDiscoveryServiceData getData​(SSOToken token, String cacheID)
      Returns cached discovery data object
      static DiscoveryDataCache getInstance()
      Gets an instance of discover data cache
      void ssoTokenChanged​(SSOTokenEvent evt)
      Gets notification when single sign on token changes state.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static DiscoveryDataCache getInstance()
        Gets an instance of discover data cache
        Returns:
        an instance of discover data cache

      • cacheData

        public String cacheData​(SSOToken token,
                        SMDiscoveryServiceData data)
        Caches a discovery data object
        Parameters:
        token - single sign on token
        data - Discovery data object to be cached
        Returns:
        an unique key for retrieve this discover data in future

      • getData

        public SMDiscoveryServiceData getData​(SSOToken token,
                                      String cacheID)
        Returns cached discovery data object
        Parameters:
        token - single sign on token
        cacheID - Key for retrieve this discovery data.
        Returns:
        discovery data object if it is found. otherwises, return null

      • ssoTokenChanged

        public void ssoTokenChanged​(SSOTokenEvent evt)
        Gets notification when single sign on token changes state.
        Specified by:
        ssoTokenChanged in interface SSOTokenListener
        Parameters:
        evt - single sign on token event

      • clearAllData

        protected void clearAllData​(SSOTokenID tokenID)
        Clears all cached discovery data of a given single sign on token ID
        Parameters:
        tokenID - single sign on token ID
